# Nik Patel

> Software engineer, pilot, DJ, and maker.

## About
Personal portfolio and blog showcasing software projects, creative work, and interests.

## Sections
- /about - Background and journey
- /projects - Software and creative work
- /blog - Technical and creative writing
- /hobbies - Aviation, music, dance, travel

## Contact
- GitHub: https://github.com/nikpatel
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/nikpatel

## Content
Content is organized by section. Each project and blog post is available as markdown.
